Phase-60.NAME: Premium Frontend QA Gates
Phase-60.objective: Create verification gates that prevent premium frontend work from shipping with layout, performance, accessibility, or MyGRACE regressions.
Phase-60.non-goals: Feature implementation, deployment script changes, live server changes.

steps.step-1: Define screenshot matrix for public, auth, user, admin, and reduced-motion routes.
steps.step-2: Define phone/tablet/desktop viewport set and no-overflow/no-overlap assertions.
steps.step-3: Define bundle, Lighthouse/Web Vitals, canvas CPU, and motion performance budgets.
steps.step-4: Define focus-visible, keyboard reachability, contrast, and reduced-motion assertions.
steps.step-5: Implement or specify Phase-60 smoke script contract.
steps.step-7: Run XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, user/admin builds, and Phase-60 smoke.

Phase-60.acceptance: Premium frontend changes have explicit repeatable verification before release work continues.

evidence.item: 2026-06-04: scripts/phase60-premium-qa-smoke.mjs implemented with route/viewport matrix, no-overlap/responsive, reduced-motion/accessibility, build artifact budget, regression smoke, MyGRACE, and protected-surface gates.
2026-06-04: frontend npm run build passed; primary JS 448516 bytes gzip 135543, primary CSS 40900 bytes gzip 8207.
2026-06-04: frontend-admin npm run build passed; primary JS 780555 bytes gzip 219372, primary CSS 36787 bytes gzip 8148. Vite large-chunk warning remains inside the Phase-60 940KB admin budget.
2026-06-04: Phase-60 smoke passed and emitted screenshot static-route proof for public/auth, protected user, admin, and reduced-motion route matrices.
2026-06-04: Phase-52/55/56/57/58/59 regression smokes passed individually and through the Phase-60 gate.
2026-06-04: XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime diff guard passed.
